activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Addition Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Perform addition using Roman numerals without converting to Hindu numerals
steps: Write Roman numerals for numbers such as XXIII and XLVII
Add them using Roman numeral rules
Verify the result by converting to Hindu–Arabic numbers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands arithmetic operations in Roman numeral system

activities_projects.title: Base-5 Number System Creation
activities_projects.objective: Understand number representation in base-5 system
steps: Write decimal numbers from 1 to 20
Convert each number into base-5 representation
Explain the place value system used

activities_projects.title: Ancient Number System Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare efficiency of different number systems
steps: Choose tally marks, Roman numerals and Hindu–Arabic numerals
Represent numbers 1–20 in each system
Explain which system is most efficient for calculations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyses strengths of different number systems

activities_projects.title: Roman Numeral Multiplication Puzzle
steps: Choose Roman numerals such as VII and IX
Find their product using logical grouping
Verify by converting into Hindu numerals

activities_projects.title: Create Your Own Base System
activities_projects.objective: Design a number system with a chosen base
steps: Choose a base such as base-4 or base-6
Define symbols for digits
Write numbers from 1 to 20 in that base
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands structure of positional number systems

activities_projects.title: Number System Timeline Project
activities_projects.objective: Investigate the evolution of number systems
steps: Research early number systems like tally marks, Egyptian numerals and Roman numerals
Create a timeline showing their development
Explain how the Hindu–Arabic system became widely used

activities_projects.title: Large Number Roman Conversion
activities_projects.objective: Convert large numbers into Roman numerals
steps: Choose numbers like 1456, 2789 and 3999
Convert them into Roman numerals
Explain the grouping of landmark numbers

activities_projects.title: Counting System Investigation
steps: Research counting systems based on groups of 2, 5 or 20
Write examples of numbers in those systems
Explain their advantages and limitations

activities_projects.title: Binary Number Exploration
steps: Write numbers from 1 to 15 in decimal form
Convert them into binary representation
Explain how binary place values work

activities_projects.title: Decimal vs Other Base Comparison
activities_projects.objective: Compare decimal system with other bases
steps: Write numbers 1–20 in base-10 and base-5
Compare the place value systems
Explain how numbers grow in different bases
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands place value differences across bases
